codeReview.summary: Fix properly addresses both blocking issues: (1) tool_call_results is now populated via new parse_action helper and ToolCallResult construction in execute_step_with_react, (2) total_tokens is now captured from LLM.chat() response.usage and accumulated across steps. All 188 tests pass.
codeReview.verdict: The fix adequately addresses the prior blocking issues. The changes are minimal and focused: execute_step_with_react now returns tool calls and tokens, parse_action extracts tool info from action JSON, decide_action_with_llm captures token usage, and execute() accumulates both across steps.
